REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1972 21st Ave, San Francisco, Ca 94116)
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion appeared by zoom for San Francisco Public Administrator.
Ana Roqueta (listing Agent) appeared by zoom.
Alana Lam (Buyer's Agent) appeared by zoom.

The sale was confirmed at $1,140,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed November 19, 2020. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is under submission for review of the order with the Court's intent to grant. Bond is waived.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
